meta_description: Your AI mentor for scholarships, learning paths, and career guidance.
landing_title: Your mentor for scholarships and learning paths.
landing_subtitle: Sign in with your menteeglobal.org account to chat with the bot about educational opportunities and your professional journey.
login_redirect_warning: Please don't reload or go back while we finish.
landing_feature_scholarships_desc: Surfaces programs and deadlines that fit your field and country.
landing_feature_paths_desc: Prioritized skills, realistic timelines, phased goals.
landing_feature_career_desc: Honest feedback about target roles and what it takes.
about_title: Helping mentees chart their next step.
about_body_1: Mentee Bot is the companion chatbot for menteeglobal.org. It surfaces scholarships, suggests realistic learning paths, and gives honest feedback about target roles — all in one conversation.
about_body_2: This is an early preview running on mock responses. Real OpenAI + Perplexity integration is coming next.
auth_error_denied: You declined to share your Mentee account.
auth_error_login_required: You need to be signed in to Mentee first.
auth_error_generic: Something went wrong talking to Mentee. Please try again.
auth_error_unknown: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
notfound_body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.
